Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I was hoping you could do me a favor. With your skill, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I was doing some research on our school, and I came across something strange.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ten years ago, a lot of students stopped coming to school for some reason.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}They were reported as absent at the time, but I found some records that suggest otherwise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Do you know anything about it, Fuuka?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I know it was a long time ago, but... doesn't it seem suspicious to you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}From what I've heard, this isn't the first time Shadows have appeared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}And I'm not trying to make trouble or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But Kirijo-senpai acts kinda weird whenever someone brings up Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I just wanna know what happened back then. And if it doesn't have anything to do with the Shadows, then fine.[n]{f 1 1}
